name: Rogue R1 FX-B
comment:
ROGUE R1 FX-B shakes things up, five times over. It orchestrates an infinite rotation of both pan and tilt for its 5 individually controlled heads, powered by five pixel mappable 15 W RGBW LEDs. Crisp beams, a sizzling output and rocket quick movements create amazing aerial effects. Control is achieved with DMX, Art-Net, sACN, or KlingNet.

Features:

- Fully featured RGBW LED yoke effect beam fixture with pixel mapping
- 16-bit Dimming of master dimmer as well as individual colors for smooth control of fades
- Built in color and tilt macros for quick design possibilities
- Continuous movement of pan and tilt functions
- Individual control of all five heads for movement and output
- Quiet operation for a wide range of installation situations
- DMX, WDMX, sACN, Art-Net, and Kling-Net control for full flexibility
- 7° beam angle to create crisp and defined areal beam effects

capabilities.comment: Link All Heads To Head 1 - Custom
Unlink All Heads To Head 1 - Custom
Strobe 2 (Fast On  Slow Off) F > S - Strobe Pulse Closed
Strobe 3 (Slow On  Fast Off) F > S - Strobe Pulse Open
Strobe Pulse Random - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe 6 (Random Slow On  Fast Off - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe 8 (Random Pulse) F > S - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe 9 (Fade In  Fade Out) F> S - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe 10 (Random Pulse) F > S - Strobe Pulse Random
Rainbow Effect F > S - Rotate CW
Reverse Rainbow Effect F > S - Rotate CCW
Link All Heads To Head 1 - Custom
Unlink All Heads To Head 1 - Custom
